<?php namespace Aws\MarketplaceMetering; use Aws\AwsClient; /** * This client is used to interact with the **AWSMarketplace Metering** service. * @method \Aws\Result batchMeterUsage(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise batchMeterUsageAsync(array $args = []) * @method \Aws\Result meterUsage(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise meterUsageAsync(array $args = []) * @method \Aws\Result registerUsage(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise registerUsageAsync(array $args = []) * @method \Aws\Result resolveCustomer(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise resolveCustomerAsync(array $args = []) */ class MarketplaceMeteringClient extends AwsClient {}
